reason: PO 2026-06-30 lock card density model (3 phases / 3 actions / 3-4 tasks)

node.statement: Builder card density model — across the desktop viewport range (REQ-RESP-001), the Builder must comfortably fit, without premature overflow/scroll: (a) ~3 expanded phase columns in the stage (per core.md §21 1440 density); (b) ~3 collapsed action cards within an expanded phase card's action area; (c) ~3–4 collapsed task tiles within an action card's task row. Overflow beyond these targets is SIGNALED (OA-1 gradient fades) but the default density must be MET by compact card spacing — without breaking consistent spacing / visual rhythm across Phase/Action/Task card types. Known gap (PO-observed 2026-06-30): 3 collapsed action cards do NOT currently fit comfortably in a phase → drives a compact action-card design (sprint CC-7).
